title: SAP Comparison

posts.author: bpotter (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello All,

I have a prospect who is a manufacturer of industrial filtration systems and they are undergoing a rebranding and preparing for IPO, thus reviewing all internal systems including CRM.

They currently use SAP, so I was wondering if there are any reports, overviews, stats, comparing monday.com with SAP that would help me convince them to move to monday.com.

Thanks in advance.
Ben
